close_reason: Correct: async_trait is required for dyn dispatch
description:
src/lib.rs uses #[async_trait::async_trait] on SecretStore, WritableSecretStore, and TokenCredential impls. azure_core's TokenCredential is itself an async_trait, so the pattern matches upstream. SecretStore is defined with async_trait in secretx-core. This is correct.

Note for future: when secretx-core moves to native async fn in trait (stable since Rust 1.75 for trait methods, with object-safety caveats), this crate will need to follow. Not actionable today. Filed as opinion to record the idiom check happened.
title: async_trait is fine for backend traits; verify SecretStore trait expects it
